name: CLX - MGA Insurance Disclosure Generator v1

nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED. Internal-call (INTERNAL_EMAIL_SECRET). Generates required INSURANCE disclosure HTML documents from documents/templates/insurance/<type>.html, substitutes {{variables}}, uploads to Cloudflare R2 at /disclosures/insurance/{client_id}/{type}.html, creates one compliance_disclosures row per type (vertical_id='insurance'). Returns array of disclosure_ids + secure URLs for the e-signature orchestrator (A3.2).

nodes.name: Upload to R2
nodes.notes: Reuses the existing 'Cloudflare R2' AWS-type credential configured in commit 25c0886 (heygen-webhook + storage-cleanup). Bucket = R2_BUCKET. ACL=publicRead so e-signature service can fetch the doc by URL during signing flow.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ vertical_id: 'insurance', client_id: $('Render Template').item.json.client_id, disclosure_type: $('Render Template').item.json.disclosure_type, disclosure_content_template_id: $('Render Template').item.json.template_id, presented_at: new Date().toISOString(), document_url: ($env.R2_PUBLIC_URL || 'https://videos.crystallux.org') + '/' + $('Render Template').item.json.storage_key }) }}

={{ (() => { const ins = $input.item.json; const row = Array.isArray(ins) ? ins[0] : ins; return JSON.stringify({ vertical_id: 'insurance', event_type: 'disclosure_generated', client_id: $('Render Template').item.json.client_id, advisor_id: $('Render Template').item.json.advisor_id, performed_by_user_id: null, performed_by_role: 'agent', event_data: { disclosure_id: row && row.id, disclosure_type: $('Render Template').item.json.disclosure_type, document_url: row && row.document_url }, occurred_at: new Date().toISOString() }); })() }}

parameters.jsCode:
const inserts = $('Insert Disclosure Row').all().map(function (i) { const row = Array.isArray(i.json) ? i.json[0] : i.json; return { id: row && row.id, disclosure_type: row && row.disclosure_type, document_url: row && row.document_url }; });
return { json: { ok: true, vertical_id: 'insurance', disclosures: inserts, count: inserts.length } };
